briefdescription.para: Main function to call example with HDMI TX, HDMI RX and HDMI GT drivers.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if HDMI example was successfully.

inbodydescription.para: Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.
Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.
Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.
Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.
Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.
Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.
Setup IIC devices and clock sources.
Initialize the HDMI Video Transmitter "state machine" functionality and the downstream HDCP device.
Set the Video Phy Error callbacks.
Initialize the controller for the example design mode.
Initialize the TPG and associated GPIO to reset the TPG.

briefdescription.para: Main function to initialize the video pipeline and process user input.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if MIPI example was successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function starts camera sensor to transmit captured video.
This function setup Camera sensor programming wrt resolution selected.
This function resets image processing pipe.
This function initializes and configures VProcSS IP for scalar mode with the given input and output width and height values.

parameterdescription.para: is a flag value to initialize IP only once.

briefdescription.para: This function stops VProc_SS scalar IP.
This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

briefdescription.para: This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

briefdescription.para: This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

briefdescription.para: This function resets IMX274 camera sensor.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function resets IMX274 camera sensor.

briefdescription.para: This function enables MIPI CSI IP.

listitem.para:
This function enables MIPI CSI IP
None.
None.
None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function disables MIPI CSI IP.

listitem.para:
This function disables MIPI CSI IP
None.
None.
None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function disables Demosaic, GammaLut and VProcSS IPs.
This function Initializes Image Processing blocks wrt to selected resolution.
This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.
This function disables MIPI DSI SS.
This function enables MIPI DSI SS.
This function initializes MIPI DSI SS and gets config parameters.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.

briefdescription.para: This function programs GPIO to '0' to select tready from DSI.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs GPIO to 1 to select MIPI DSI SS Stream Path in AXI- Stream switch.

briefdescription.para: This function programs GPIO to '0' to select tready from HDMI.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs GPIO to '0' to select HDMI Stream path in AXI-Stream switch.

briefdescription.para: Function to enable XPIO DCI.
Function to enable XPIO equalization.
Function to rnable MMCME5 Fabric Control in PCSR.
Function to enable MMCME5 Fabric Control in PCSR.
